  "findings": [
    "Unprotected trench depth of 5 feet or greater with workers actively inside",
    "Lack of cave-in protection (shoring, shielding, or sloping)",
    "Imminent danger of cave-in or collapse"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Order all workers to evacuate the trench immediately",
    "Stop all work in the immediate vicinity of the trench",
    "Install compliant protective systems (trench box, shoring, or sloping) before re-entry",
    "Ensure a competent person inspects the trench and protective systems prior to resuming work"
  ],
  "rationale": "An unprotected trench of 5 feet or deeper with workers inside is a direct violation of OSHA standards and poses an immediate, life-threatening cave-in hazard.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926 Subpart P",
    "OSHA 1926.652(a)(1)"
  ]
}
